title: TreexCastle
description: Durable blocks that drop loot. Gui support
body:
**TreexCastle** adds a "Castle Event" to your server. The premise of the event is that a random Shulker—selected from a predefined pool, each with its own unique settings—spawns at one of several designated random locations. Players must destroy this Shulker by depleting its durability; once the block's durability reaches zero, random resources are dropped as a reward.


[![DISCORD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60fcf5a0b12f3cff46b065aea871b3f08629f94e.png)](https://dsc.gg/jmdev)[![DONATE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a1b54c640e2f990880107e8bf3cd6c573a9201a.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jetby)

| **Dependencies**| |
|:-|-|
| **Libb** | [Download](https://modrinth.com/plugin/libb) |
| Java 17 or higher | 
| Paper or forks |
| Minecraft Version 1.20 or higher |

**Features:**
- Full Customization
- Simple Configuration
- Item Configuration via GUI (`/shulker menu`)
- [PlaceholderAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi) Support

**Placeholders:**
- Time until start: `%treexcastle_time_to_start%`
- Time until start (formatted string): `%treexcastle_time_to_start_string%`
